positive: A stylized, highly contrasting geometric illustration featuring a majestic, stylized celestial owl perched on a crescent moon. The composition is centrally framed and symmetrically balanced. The owl has sharp, defined silhouettes and glowing neon blue eyes, contrasting against a deep indigo and celestial gold background. Incorporate minimalist constellation line work and abstract cosmic dust. The overall style should be modern geometric linocut art with a vaporwave cyberpunk aesthetic, suitable for apparel printing. Extremely clean lines, strong graphic appeal, perfect for screen printing.
